title: Almost Perfectly Optimized
description: Effectively optimizes the gaming experience by increasing in-game FPS, it also contains mods that replace Optifine.
body:
## PERFORMANCE CHANGES
Through this modpack you will be able to enjoy the classic Minecraft experience with an increase in performance, guaranteed by certain mods such as Sodium, Lithium, Starlight etc..., which help the performance of the game thus obtaining a smoother experience, always maintaining the classic thrill of Minecraft.
## FUNCTIONALITY CHANGES
You will also be able to take advantage of the features that Optifine mod guarantees, such as shaders, through Iris mod, zoom, through Essential mod, connected textures, with Continuity mod and personalized items, thanks to CIT resewn mod.
## UTILITY CHANGES
With this modpack you will be able to enjoy some quality life changes, for example being able to see the shulker boxes directly from the inventory, having night vision via a simple button, being able to view the saturation of the food and organizing the keycaps in a more intuitive way.
## MODPACK CUSTOMIZATION
Despite these changes you will be able to customize the modpack to your liking, adding mods or texturepacks. (Please note, avoid mods that conflict with those already present in the package otherwise it may not work)
## LAST RACOMANDATION
In order to use this modpack, Java version 21 or higher must be used together with the last stable version of Fabric loader. If you have done everything correctly I wish you a good gaming experience.
